headline: BP Eyes Growth Offshore Azerbaijan With Babek Gas Field Project
summary: BP gains operatorship of Azerbaijan's Babek gas field, which deepens its foothold in Azerbaijan's energy sector.

headline: Brokers Suggest Investing in Valero Energy (VLO): Read This Before Placing a Bet
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Valero Energy (VLO). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?
